titles.title: I Have Decided to Follow Jesus

authors.author: Sadhu Sundar Singh
Indien
Ich bin entschieden, zu folgen Jesus

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have decided to follow Jesus, I have decided to follow Jesus, I have decided to follow Jesus, No turning back, no turning back.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Tho’ no one joins me, still I will follow, Tho’ no one joins me, still I will follow, Tho’ no one joins me, still I will follow No turning back, no turning back

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The cross before me, the world behind me, The cross before me, the world behind me, The cross before me, the world behind me, No turning back, no turning back
